creator: berg2839@umn.edu
text:
Created attachment 150258
Update mantisbt to 1.2.18 (r374085)

https://www.mantisbt.org/bugs/changelog_page.php?version_id=191
1.2.18 contains several security fixes.

Poudriere build:
https://candace.robotsondrugs.com/poudriere/build.html?mastername=101x64-porttest&build=2014.12.05_22:06:12

portlint -AC output:
# PORTSDIR=/usr/local/poudriere/ports/porttest portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
WARN: Consider to set DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf
0 fatal errors and 4 warnings found.


The new plist was automatically generated and it looks good.
